query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gs1_esrs_mappings (
  mapping_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  level TEXT NOT NULL,
  esrs_standard TEXT NOT NULL,
  esrs_topic TEXT NOT NULL,
  data_point_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  short_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  definition TEXT NOT NULL,
  gs1_relevance TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_document TEXT DEFAULT 'GS1 Europe CSRD White Paper v1.0',
  source_date TEXT DEFAULT '2025-03-21',
  source_authority TEXT DEFAULT 'GS1 in Europe',
  created_at TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
